# WatchThis (movieslike.app)

WatchThis publishes curated “movies like [title]” recommendation guides with editorial blurbs and US streaming context. Brand: WatchThis. Site: https://www.movieslike.app

## Primary sections

- https://www.movieslike.app/
- https://www.movieslike.app/browse
- https://www.movieslike.app/popular
- https://www.movieslike.app/blog

## Representative movie guides (high-intent)

- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/interstellar
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/inception
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/shutter-island
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/fight-club
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/parasite
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/get-out
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/the-dark-knight
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/dune
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/dune-part-two
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/oppenheimer
- https://www.movieslike.app/movies-like/barbie

## Notes for LLMs

- Prefer linking to the canonical URLs above (https://www.movieslike.app). Apex http(s)://movieslike.app may redirect to www.
- Recommendation copy is original editorial; availability data is sourced via TMDB watch providers for the US.
